text:
On Wed, 9 Aug 2000 terrance@hoku.2y.net wrote:

> >Description:
> after using mouse in Xfree86 mouse suddenly locks up and doesn't free up.
> 
> Tried to exit Xfree86 and restart still locked, also ends up locked in terminal window
> although when using it there no problem seems to exist. 
> Until locked by Xfree86.
> 

XFree86-3.3.6 or -4.0?
